actor.goal: preserve narrative graph reporting lineage before any executable graph reporter exists

story.iWant: a contract for rendering narrative graphs that is fully described before execution
story.soThat: no graph reporter body can become a hidden source of truth

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The narrative graph rendering behavior is fully described before any executable script exists.
Source narrative, story packet, canonical spec, projection manifest, lineage receipt, and report expectations are named and bounded.
